question: In what year was the football club founded that the 2025 Ballon d'Or winner was playing for when he won?
expected_answer: 1970 — the winner, Ousmane Dembele, plays for Paris Saint-Germain, founded in 1970.
notes: Chain: 2025 Ballon d'Or winner (Dembele) -> his club (Paris Saint-Germain) -> founding year. Accept the founding year the retrieved evidence states for PSG.
